mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in retail sales captures broad consumer spending momentum that translates into higher corporate revenues and earnings expectations, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC between RSAFS and 20-day SPX returns falls below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate above 5 percent reflects restrictive monetary policy that raises discount rates and corporate borrowing costs, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Negative 20-day SPX returns occur in fewer than 55 percent of months when FEDFUNDS exceeds 5.0 percent over a 5-year walk-forward window.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent rising unemployment and falling nonfarm payrolls signal accelerating labor market deterioration that reduces aggregate wage income and consumer spending, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal from UNRATE and PAYEMS fails to predict negative 60-day SPX returns in at least 60 percent of top-quartile signal realizations over any 4-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production during late-cycle expansions signals supply-side contraction and capacity underutilization that squeezes corporate margins, generating negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines coincide with positive 20-day SPX returns in more than 50 percent of late-cycle instances during walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts below 1400 thousand units indicate a sharp contraction in residential construction and durable goods demand that drags down cyclical earnings, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Positive 5-day SPX returns occur in more than 55 percent of months when HOUST is below 1400 over a 5-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: An accelerating consumer price index forces the central bank to maintain tighter real policy rates, raising equity risk premiums and generating negative S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Negative 5-day SPX returns occur in fewer than 55 percent of triggered months when CPIAUCSL 3-month change exceeds 1.5 over a 5-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in industrial production reflects rising capacity utilization and factory orders that boost manufacturing earnings and drive positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC between INDPRO and 60-day SPX returns falls below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Positive quarterly growth in real GDP signals aggregate demand expansion that lifts broad corporate revenues and generates positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Positive GDPC1 growth coincides with negative 60-day SPX returns in more than 45 percent of quarters during walk-forward testing.
